# xposeTIP Contributor License Agreement

Thank you for your interest in contributing to xposeTIP (the "Project").

By submitting a contribution (a "Contribution") to this Project, you agree to the following terms. The cla-assistant.io GitHub App will record your acceptance when you sign on a pull request.

## 1. You have the right to contribute

Your Contribution is your original work, or you have obtained the necessary rights and permissions from the actual author. If your employer has rights to intellectual property you create that includes your Contribution, you have either:

- Received permission from your employer to make the Contribution on their behalf, or
- Your employer has waived such rights for the Contribution.

## 2. You grant the Project a broad license

You grant Nabil Ksontini (the "Project Owner"), and any party the Project Owner designates, a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license to:

- Reproduce your Contribution, prepare derivative works of it, publicly display and publicly perform it, sublicense it, and distribute it
- **Relicense your Contribution under any license terms, including but not limited to the GNU Affero General Public License v3 (the Project's current open source license) and proprietary commercial licenses**

This dual-licensing right is essential to the Project's sustainability model and allows commercial use of the Project alongside the open-source community.

## 3. You retain copyright

You retain all right, title, and interest in and to your Contribution. The license you grant the Project Owner is non-exclusive — you remain free to use your Contribution for any purpose, including in other projects under any license you choose.

## 4. Patent grant

You grant the Project Owner and downstream recipients of the Project a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable patent license under any of your patent claims that are necessarily infringed by your Contribution or by combination of your Contribution with the Project.

If you or your employer files a patent infringement lawsuit alleging that the Project or a Contribution to the Project infringes a patent, your patent licenses for that Contribution terminate as of the date such litigation is filed.

## 5. No warranty

Your Contribution is provided "AS IS", without warranty of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to the warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

## 6. Confirmation

To accept this CLA, sign in to GitHub on any pull request to this repository and follow the cla-assistant.io prompts. Acceptance is recorded per GitHub username and persists across all your future Contributions to this Project.

---

*This CLA is loosely based on the Apache Individual CLA, modified to express dual-licensing intent.*
